view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of downstream cancellation effects.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of downstream cancellation effects.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the cancellation of an upstream service (like bleach) affects downstream services (tone and cut). However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of the cancellation behavior or its impact on downstream bookings, leading to an inconclusive result. The only available evidence pertains to the booking process without addressing the specific requirement of cancellation effects, indicating a lack of sufficient evidence to make a definitive judgment.
